summary: Completed testing of Phase 2 features for Sahakar Pharmacy Inventory Intelligence Platform. Backend APIs achieved 93.5% success rate (29/31 tests). All Phase 2 dashboard enhancements, aging report, and export functionality verified successfully. Frontend navigation and UI tested across new Phase 2 modules.

fixed_bugs.issue: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for +=: 'Row' and 'int' on line 319
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Added explicit float() casting for SQLAlchemy Row objects in ho_map and ss_map processing

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of expected 201 for store creation
Returns 200 instead of expected 201 for user creation

integration_issues.issue: User sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-authentication during testing
integration_issues.note: May impact user experience but functionality works correctly after login

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@sahakar.com / admin123
Phase 2 Enhanced Dashboard with 8 KPI cards including Dead Stock and Slow Moving
Dead Stock KPI card showing count and value
Slow Moving KPI card showing count and value
Dead Stock Alerts section with proper messaging
Recent Activity section showing upload history
Navigation items: Aging Report, RC Customers, Audit Log added to sidebar
Aging Report page loads with bucket summary cards (0-30, 30-60, 60-90, 90+)
Aging Report location and status filters functional
Aging Report data table showing inventory with aging information
Aging Report export button present and functional
RC Customers page navigation working
Audit Log page navigation working
Intelligence Summary API returns dead stock and recommendations data
Aging Report API returns aging buckets and stock analysis
Batch Details API functional for product inventory
Refill Reminders API working for RC customers
Audit Logs API with pagination and filtering
Excel Export APIs: Products (✓), HO Stock (✓), Consolidated (✓), Aging (✓)
Backend API comprehensive testing (29/31 tests passed)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Core Phase 2 features working, minor session management issue)
